fundraiser.title: Matt's Freedom Fundraiser — Mission Accomplished
fundraiser.description: Matt's Freedom Fundraiser successfully helped Matt Raynor transition from institutional care into independent living. The mission is complete — Matt now lives independently in Hampton Bays, NY, has his own care, and is building his career as a freelance AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer while seeking a full-time remote role.
fundraiser.outcome: Success. Matt is living independently, has care, and is actively building and shipping production software.

creator.name: Matt Raynor
creator.title: AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
creator.current_status: Freelancing, four live production apps, seeking full-time remote role

status.housing: Living independently in Hampton Bays, NY
status.career: Freelance AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer, actively seeking full-time remote employment

fundraiser.technical_achievement: When GoFundMe nearly blocked a $26K withdrawal through predatory policies, Matt built his own donation platform from scratch using React 19, TypeScript, Django REST Framework, and direct Stripe integration — eliminating all middleman fees. That's the kind of builder he is.
how_to_support_matt_now: Hire Matt for freelance AI engineering or web development work
Connect him with full-time remote opportunities
Check out his portfolio at matthewraynor.com
Try his AI shopping assistant at store.matthewraynor.com
Share his work on social media
